mapper.insert: insert into ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, SRC_ELEMENT_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_TYPE_, SRC_DEF_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_TYPE_) values ( #{id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{transientVariable, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{sourceElementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sourceScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sourceScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceDefinitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{targetScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{targetScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, SRC_ELEMENT_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_TYPE_, SRC_DEF_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_TYPE_) values
(#{entry.id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entry.timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entry.operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.transientVariable, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{entry.sourceElementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceDefinitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.targetScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.targetScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT ALL
INTO ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, SRC_ELEMENT_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_ID_, SRC_SCOPE_TYPE_, SRC_DEF_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_ID_, TGT_SCOPE_TYPE_) VALUES (#{entry.id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entry.timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entry.operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.transientVariable, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{entry.sourceElementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.sourceDefinitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.targetScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.targetScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT * FROM dual
